capabilityshape.go:17:6: cell "rate" declares Bounds() (int, int), but a control requires Bounds() (float64, float64); it will not render as a control.
                         a range control needs two float64 bounds; the runtime probe reads them as float64 (use float64 even for an integer range)
capabilityshape.go:25:6: cell "mode" declares Options() []int, but a control requires Options() []string; it will not render as a control.
                         a select/multi-select reads its choices as []string; return the option labels as strings
